---
title: "Welcome to my Website!"
image: images/Headshot1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/allanalmaraz/
---

Hello, my name is Allan Almaraz. I am a first-generation graduate student pursuing my Master of Science in Business Analytics (MSBA) at the University of California, Irvine (UCI), with a passion for using data to inform decisions and drive meaningful change. This is my professional portfolio, where you can explore who I am, my experience, and the projects I have worked on. Welcome, and please take a look around!

```{=html}
<style>
.nav-cards {display: flex; gap: 1.2em; margin-top: 2.5em;}
.nav-card {flex: 1; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.4em 1.6em; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;}
.nav-card:hover {box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); border-color: #999; text-decoration: none;}
.nav-card h3 {margin: 0 0 0.4em 0; font-size: 1em; font-weight: 600;}
.nav-card p {margin: 0; font-size: 0.85em; color: #666; line-height: 1.5;}
</style>

<div class="nav-cards">
  <a class="nav-card" href="about.html">
    <h3>About Me →</h3>
    <p>Explore my personal background, my values, and what drives me as a first-generation graduate student and aspiring analyst.</p>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="experience.html">
    <h3>Experience →</h3>
    <p>Learn about my professional experience, the skills I have developed, and a timeline of key milestones in my journey.</p>
  </a>
  <a class="nav-card" href="projects.html">
    <h3>Projects →</h3>
    <p>Gain access to the reports, code, and presentations from relevant projects I have worked on, along with key takeaways from each.</p>
  </a>
</div>
```


###
## Personal Mission Statement

I believe data has the power to move organizations forward. My goal is to contribute to the kinds of companies that shape everyday life, the brands and institutions that people interact with through the products they buy, the food they eat, and the places they work and learn. I find purpose in knowing that my analysis could influence how these organizations operate, and that the impact of that work would be visible in the world around me. Whether supporting a restaurant brand, an apparel company, an automotive manufacturer, or a university, I aspire to be the analyst who turns complex data into decisions that actually change how things are done. For me, that is what makes analytics meaningful.

## Goals & Target Opportunities

Through my MSBA program and professional experience, I have developed a growing toolkit centered on data analysis and business strategy, and I am intentionally using it as a pivot into more technical, analytical work. By deepening my expertise in R, SQL, Python, Tableau, and Power BI, my goal is to bridge the analytical and strategic sides of a business: not just reporting what happened, but informing what should happen next. With a graduation date of June 2026, I am actively pursuing entry-level analyst roles in financial, marketing, and business analytics across industries like food service, higher education, and consumer goods.

#### 

```{=html}
<style>
.three-col-wrapper {display: flex; gap: 1.5em; margin: 1em 0;}
.three-col-box {flex: 1; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.2em 1.5em; background: #f8f8f8;}
.three-col-box h4 {margin: 0 0 0.8em 0; font-size: 1em; font-weight: 600; color: #000;}
.three-col-item {display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6em; padding: 0.3em 0; font-size: 0.9em; color: #333; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;}
.three-col-item:last-child {border-bottom: none;}
.three-col-dot {width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2563eb; flex-shrink: 0;}
</style>

<div class="three-col-wrapper">
  <div class="three-col-box">
    <h4>Target Roles</h4>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Financial Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Budget Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Marketing Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Supply Chain Analyst</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Business Strategy Analyst</div>
  </div>
  <div class="three-col-box">
    <h4>Target Industries</h4>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Restaurant & Food Service</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Higher Education</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Local Government</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Consumer Packaged Goods</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Apparel</div>
  </div>
  <div class="three-col-box">
    <h4>Target Regions</h4>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Ventura County</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Santa Barbara County</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Sacramento County</div>
    <div class="three-col-item"><span class="three-col-dot"></span>Orange County</div>
  </div>
</div>
```
